headline: BASF's Emulgade Verde PE Debuts in Asia Pacific at in-cosmetics Korea
summary: BASFY is bringing Emulgade Verde PE to the Asia Pacific, offering formulators a simpler way to deliver hydrophilic actives in care products.

raw.headline: BASF's Emulgade Verde PE Debuts in Asia Pacific at in-cosmetics Korea

headline: Reliance Stock Rises 34% YTD: Will the Momentum Continue?
summary: RS shares are up 33.5% year to date on record Q1 shipment volumes, extending its streak of industry outperformance as infrastructure demand and acquisitions support growth.
